directInvocation.note: Address any agent by internal or display name to run a scoped task without going through Zord. Guardrails still apply; agents check prerequisites first.

buildTarget.identityRule: Build with the native tenant admin for browser + all CLIs/MCP. Guests break tooling (404 / env-not-found / orphaned ownership). See identity.md.

solution.rule: EVERY Dataverse-backed artifact the squad creates MUST live inside the active delivery solution (publisher prefix 'psq'). Zord owns this: she creates/identifies the solution, BROADCASTS its unique name to every builder in their brief, and runs a final solution audit to backfill any orphan that landed in Default. The ONLY exception is Pink Ranger (Storyteller): her deck/script save to the PC/library, not the solution.
solution.currentSolutionNote: For a quick demo, use a single reusable solution 'psq_demo' and put every artifact in it. Per real client engagement, Zord creates a fresh 'psq_<client>_<yyyymmdd>' instead.
solution.powerPagesSolutionAware: Power Pages IS solution-aware (enhanced data model). Studio Data ⚙ 'Set a solution' sets the Current solution (defaults to Default CDS solution — switch to psq_demo first). Add the site via Solutions → Add existing → Site; backing Dataverse tables must be added separately.

gitIntegration.rule: Zord binds the delivery solution to source control via Dataverse NATIVE Git integration (Solutions → Connect to Git). Native integration is Azure DevOps Git (not GitHub). Requires Managed Environments + an ADO org/project/repo + system administrator. Default/CDS Default solution CANNOT be Git-connected — another reason everything lives in the delivery solution. Solution-bind psq_demo to an ADO repo and do a first commit.
gitIntegration.binding: environment-binding recommended to start; solution-binding to scope just psq_demo

contextSources.powerPlatformDevDocs: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/power-platform/developer/ — CANONICAL reference for ALL Power Platform work (pac CLI, Dataverse Web API, Power Fx, apps, solutions/ALM, Power Pages, connectors, Copilot Studio). Consult before implementing/verifying across every agent.
